Premium Muslin Baby Sleeping Bag

Summer "Muted Tones" Series (OEM/ODM)

Sage Green
Terracotta
Sand
TOG Rating 0.5 TOG

Request Sample → Get Wholesale Pricing
🌱 OEKO-TEX® Std 100 ✅ CPC Certified 🛡️ EN 16781 Hip Healthy
Product Overview

The New Era of "Emotional Parenting" Aesthetics

In a market shifting away from loud, neon patterns, our Muted Tones Series leads the trend in "Emotional Parenting." Featuring a palette of Sage Green, Terracotta, and Neutral Earth Tones, these colors are selected not just for their beauty, but for their ability to create a calming sleep environment.

This collection aligns perfectly with the "Sustainable Fashion" visual identity that modern parents demand — and that today's most influential baby brands are built around.

Designed specifically for high-temperature climates, our summer sleep sacks utilize high-performance muslin blends that prioritize airflow and thermal regulation. We combine the softness of organic fibers with professional-grade construction to ensure durability through repeated industrial laundering.

Key Features

Designed to Sell & Perform

Every detail is crafted to satisfy the modern parent and meet the demands of global retail buyers.

🎨

The Muted Palette

Sage Green, Terracotta, and Sand — the definitive trending colors for the 2026 nursery market. Exclusive to our Muted Tones Series.

🌬️

Optimal Breathability

Ultra-lightweight muslin construction (RET optimized) ensures maximum ventilation to prevent overheating during summer nights.

🌿

Eco-Conscious & Sustainable

Made with eco-friendly dyes, compliant with OEKO-TEX® Standard 100. Appeals to environmentally conscious consumers and ESG-focused buyers.

🔒

Ergonomic Safety Design

Two-way safety zipper with integrated chin guard. Bell-shaped bottom supports healthy hip development — Hip Healthy certified.

✨

Premium Softness

Pre-washed fabric that maintains structural integrity while becoming softer with every wash. Parents notice the quality difference immediately.

🏭

19 Years of Manufacturing

Leverage our deep manufacturing expertise and multi-factory infrastructure — including SE Asia facilities for tariff optimization.

Technical Specifications

Built to Spec

Feature Details
Material 100% Organic Cotton Muslin / Bamboo-Cotton Blend (Customizable)
TOG Rating 0.5 TOG — ideal for room temperatures 24°C–27°C / 75°F–81°F
Sizes S (0–6M) · M (6–18M) · L (18–36M) · XL (3–5Y)
Certifications CPC · EN 16781 · REACH · OEKO-TEX® Standard 100
Care Machine wash cold · Tumble dry low
MOQ 500 units per style (flexible color-way distribution available)
Sample Lead Time 7–10 business days
B2B & Supply Chain

Scale Your Collection with Confidence

Leverage our 19 years of manufacturing expertise and multi-factory infrastructure for your private label needs.

📦

Flexible MOQ

500 units per style with flexible color-way distribution — mix Sage Green, Terracotta, and Sand across your order.

🏷️

Full OEM/ODM Services

Private labeling, custom embroidery, proprietary pattern development. Your brand, our expertise.

🌏

Tariff-Optimized Production

Strategic production capabilities including SE Asia facilities to ensure stable lead times and tariff optimization for your target markets.

🧪

Professional Sampling

Pre-production prototypes delivered within 7–10 business days. Review, refine, and approve before bulk commitment.
